sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_times (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO test_times (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE '10:15:30.456-05:00');
UPDATE test_times SET event_time = TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE '12:00:00.000+00:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time FROM test_times WHERE event_time > TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE '11:00:00.000+00:00';
DELETE FROM test_times WHERE event_time < TIME(3) WITH TIME ZONE '08:00:00.000+01:00';
